issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as invalid cron syntax or permission issues.
The skill is limited to Linux/macOS and does not support Windows or other platforms.

scenarios.name: schedule-weekday-report
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy all rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: system-db-backup
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but misdirects output to a file instead of the log, while Response B only sets up directories and logs, missing the cron file entirely.
